notableEvents.label: Austin Riley plunked
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley hit by pitch. Mauricio Dubón to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Jorge Mateo scores. Ozzie Albies to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Jorge Mateo scores. Ozzie Albies to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña singles on a sharp ground ball to third baseman Austin Riley. Luisangel Acuña to 2nd. Luisangel Acuña advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Austin Riley.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Jorge Mateo scores. Ozzie Albies to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: White Sox challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Luisangel Acuña steals (12) 3rd base.
